svg.aria-label: The tool DAG with dependency levels. Four tool nodes: E1 search_policy, E2 search_products for the acquirer, E3 search_products for the warranty, and E4 calculator. The only dependency edge runs from E2 to E3. E1, E2, and E4 sit in round 1 and could run in parallel; E3 sits in round 2 because it depends on E2. A synthesis join node depends on E1, E3, and E4. The critical-path depth is 2, the longest dependency chain, while there are still 4 tool calls.
svg.title: The tool DAG: independent nodes share a round, so critical-path depth, not step count, sets the sequential rounds

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif

svg.text: Part 3, the tool DAG and critical-path depth

svg.text: The tool DAG: run by dependency level, count depth not steps

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif

svg.text: Independent nodes share a round; only a real dependency forces a new one. The longest chain (E2 -> E3) is the critical path.

svg.text: the longest dependency chain is E2 -> E3 (two levels).

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif

svg.text: E1, E2, E4 share round 1, so depth is what concurrency would shrink.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif
Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif

svg.text: the work itself does not shrink:

svg.text: E1, E2, E3, E4 all still run.

svg.text: the DAG halves the rounds the

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif
Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif

svg.text: We report LLM calls and critical-path depth, never wall-clock. "Parallel" means "could run in the same round"; depth is the sequential rounds real concurrency would shrink.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif

svg.text: Same answer as ReAct, plan-and-execute, and ReWOO; the DAG just collapses the three independent lookups into one round.
